subcodes.title: Words to Louis Gregory, spoken on 1911-04-11
subcodes.first_line: This theory is not true. But in very ancient times Asia led all the continents in civilization. At this time there was a connection between Asia and America which was lost and entirely forgotten.
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition, @universality of the Cause, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
